# Chapter 8 Enabling and Disabling EGMs

The EGM Enable/Disable feature allows enabling or disabling individual machines and assigning specific enable/disable schedules to groups of machines on the casino floor.

> If the Machine Accounting system is connected to the IGT sbX system, serial numbers must match between both systems. Asset numbers from Machine Accounting are automatically enrolled within sbX.

## 8.1 Enabling Machines

To enable machines, select the target machines using one of the following methods:

- **Machine Filters** — Filter by denomination, section, bank, manufacturer, or other criteria, then apply the filter.
- **Select All** — Select all machines.
- **Individual selection** — Select one or more specific machines.
- **Machine List** — Select all machines in a predefined group.

Once selected, the machines are enabled.

## 8.2 Disabling Machines

Disabling machines follows the same selection methods as enabling. Once selected, the machines are disabled.

## 8.3 EGM Groups

Machines can be organized into groups for batch enable/disable operations.

### Creating a Group

Provide a **Group Name** to create a new EGM group.

### Assigning Machines to Groups

Machines can be added to or removed from a group. Each machine can belong to multiple groups.

> Machines cannot be added or removed from the "Entire Floor" group.

### Activating / Deactivating Groups

Groups can be activated or deactivated as needed.

### Renaming Groups

An existing group's name can be changed.

### Deleting Groups

A group can be removed. This does not affect the machines themselves.

## 8.4 Schedules

Schedules automate the enabling or disabling of EGM groups at specified times.

### Creating a Schedule

The following information is required:

- **Description** — Name of the schedule
- **Schedule Enabled** — Whether the schedule is active
- **Frequency** — One Time Only, Daily, Weekly, or Monthly
- **Action** — Disable on or Enable on a specified date and time
- **Exclusion Dates** — Optional dates/times to exclude from the schedule
- **End Condition** — Optional disable date/time to end the schedule's effect

### Deleting Schedules

Schedules can be removed from groups or from the entire floor.
